config.title: Autocomplete
config.debug.description: Log full request/response details to the output channel
config.maxTokens.description: Maximum tokens in the completion response
config.temperature.description: Sampling temperature (0 = deterministic, higher = more creative)
config.fim.mode.auto: Auto-detect FIM support from the server (Ollama)
config.fim.mode.serverManaged: Server applies its own FIM template (Ollama, LM Studio)
config.userAgent.description: User-Agent header sent with every request
config.debounceMs.description: Delay in milliseconds before sending a completion request
config.contextLines.description: Number of lines of context to include around the cursor
config.systemPrompt.description: Custom system prompt for chat completions. Leave empty to use the built-in default.
